body:
No code changes in this attempt — bead ddx-db5e0227 is a sub-epic whose AC is "All child beads closed."
The plan at /tmp/story-1-final.md defines three concrete child slices (bead-A, bead-B, bead-C). The
parent had no children filed, so this attempt decomposed the epic into the three planned beads and
exited per the execute-bead size-check protocol.

Children created:

- ddx-6f41aa55  bead-A  fix(web): doc graph edges and arrowheads use foreground token, not border-line
                 Tier: cheap. Surface: cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/components/D3Graph.svelte
                 lines 107 (arrow marker fill) and 165 (edge stroke). Swap border-line -> fg-muted in
                 light/dark; bump stroke-width 1.5 -> 1.75; stroke-opacity 0.6 -> 0.9; add
                 stroke-linecap="round". Deps: none.

- ddx-0ba83363  bead-C  docs(spec): FEAT-008 AC for graph edge contrast (WCAG AA non-text)
                 Tier: cheap. Single-file edit to docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-008-web-ui.md
                 codifying WCAG AA 3:1 non-text contrast for doc graph edges/arrowheads in both
                 themes. Deps: none. Can land in parallel with bead-A.

- ddx-7e7b12f0  bead-B  test(web): e2e regression check for doc graph edge color tokens
                 Tier: standard. New Playwright spec at
                 cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/graph/graph.e2e.ts
                 asserting computed edge stroke and arrow marker fill resolve to fg-muted in light
                 (#4B5563) and dark-fg-muted (#B8AF9C) after toggling html.dark. May add a fixture
                 if the existing GraphQL mock has no project with edges. Depends on ddx-6f41aa55
                 (bead-A) so the regression check runs against the corrected component.

Dependency edges:
  ddx-7e7b12f0 depends on ddx-6f41aa55  (recorded via `ddx bead dep add`)

Parent (ddx-db5e0227) was annotated via `ddx bead update --notes` to record the decomposition.

Locked planning decisions honored:
- Class-swap to fg-muted/dark-fg-muted (not a new dedicated graph-edge token) — bead-A.
- Stroke-width 1.75 / opacity 0.9 / stroke-linecap round — bead-A. Mitigation note from plan §6.2
  preserved in bead-A description: keep stroke-width at 1.5 if 1.75 reads heavy on dense fixtures.
- Computed-style assertions in Playwright (no screenshot snapshots / no new visual regression infra) — bead-B.
- Spec AC framed as WCAG AA 3:1 non-text contrast — bead-C.
- Cost-tiered routing: bead-A and bead-C cheap, bead-B standard, bead-A and bead-C parallelizable,
  bead-B sequenced after bead-A.

Follow-up: queue picks up the three children. Parent epic stays in_progress until all three close,
at which point this AC ("All child beads closed.") is met.
